name: @agentdeploymentco/argus
description: Audit your Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI usage: tokens over time, skill/plugin/MCP-server attribution, and per-session summaries. Reads local transcripts; emits a self-contained HTML dashboard.

scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun build src/cli.ts --target=node --external sqlite3 --outfile=dist/cli.js && tail -n +2 dist/cli.js > dist/cli.temp && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/cli.temp > dist/cli.js && rm dist/cli.temp && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.desktop:dev: bun run desktop:stage && cd desktop && bunx tauri dev
scripts.desktop:build: bun run desktop:stage && cd desktop && bunx tauri build
